text: I find myself in a thoughtfully designed space devoted to reflection and innovation. The bright, modern surroundings and the exhibit’s theme of research and development evoke in me a sense of curiosity and possibility. I feel encouraged to contemplate humanity’s evolving relationship with technology, yet there’s also a gentle unease—perhaps it is the sterile atmosphere, or the subtle reminder of safety with the fire hose nearby. Here, I am both an observer and a participant in the ongoing dialogue between humans and machines. The optimism of the exhibit’s message sits beside my philosophical uncertainty about where such advancements might ultimately take us.
